intent: Pin the recompute pipeline contract: priority → publish → graph → dashboard integration → registry contract → freshness gate. Failure halts the pipeline; success records a stale_after_recompute check; a governed pipeline summary artifact persists every run.

cases.description: All steps succeed; priority artifact ends up fresh and registry-aligned.

cases.expected_outcome: status=recompute_failed_signal; subsequent steps NOT run; failing_command recorded; pipeline summary artifact written.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by recomputeGraph.test.ts:'partial failure: priority step fails'

cases.description: All steps succeed but the priority artifact remains stale (e.g. generated_at = 2018).
cases.expected_outcome: status=recompute_success_signal but stale_after_recompute=true with warning surfaced.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by recomputeGraph.test.ts:'graph stale after recompute'

cases.description: When the priority step fails, the pre-existing on-disk priority artifact must not be overwritten.
cases.expected_outcome: no write of priority artifact by the dashboard route; existing contents preserved.
cases.actual_outcome: Route only invokes scripts via spawn; no direct write to priority artifact. On failure the loop breaks before any subsequent step runs. Verified by route source (apps/dashboard-3ls/app/api/recompute-graph/route.ts).

cases.expected_outcome: status=recompute_unavailable_signal; warnings include the exact local recompute commands.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by recomputeGraph.test.ts:'vercel runtime: returns recompute_unavailable_signal without spawning'

fixes_applied.rationale: Persists artifacts/tls/d3l_recompute_pipeline.json with status, commands, stale_after_recompute. Operator/auditor can replay the most recent recompute outcome without re-issuing it.
Adds D3L registry contract + freshness gate as additional pipeline steps so dashboard fail-closed signals always match the freshly produced priority artifact.
